creator: dima@unixfreak.org
text:
dpelleg+bsd@cs.cmu.edu writes:
> 
> >Number:         26480
> >Category:       docs
> >Synopsis:       shouts in named manpage
> >Description:
> The "synopsis" line has "named" in UPPERCASE.

named(8) isn't maintained by FreeBSD, it's maintained by ISC; FreeBSD
just imports the BIND distribution.  Could you please submit this to
them instead?
